name: Notion
one_liner: All-in-one workspace for notes, docs, wikis, and databases.
self_serve_notes: Developers create an internal integration token instantly for free at notion.so/my-integrations, or use OAuth2 for public integrations.

api_surface.notes: Broad REST API covering pages, databases, blocks, users, comments, and search.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Notion toolkit with 45 tools/13 triggers; Notion also has a well-known official/community MCP server.

name: Airtable
one_liner: Cloud spreadsheet-database hybrid for building custom apps and workflows.
self_serve_notes: Personal access tokens can be generated instantly and free in account settings; legacy API keys were deprecated Feb 2024.

api_surface.notes: Full REST API for bases, tables, records, fields, comments, and attachments.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists an Airtable toolkit with 23 tools/6 triggers, supporting OAuth2 and API Key auth.

name: Linear
one_liner: Issue tracking and project management tool built for software teams.
self_serve_notes: Personal API keys are generated free and instantly in workspace settings; OAuth2 available for public apps.

api_surface.notes: Single GraphQL endpoint covering issues, projects, cycles, comments, and teams.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Linear toolkit (32 tools/3 triggers); Linear also has a known official MCP server.

name: Jira
one_liner: Issue and project tracking software for agile software development teams.
self_serve_notes: A free Jira Cloud site plus API token can be created instantly via id.atlassian.com without sales contact.

api_surface.notes: Extensive REST v3 API covering issues, projects, workflows, JQL search, and admin operations.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Jira toolkit (94 tools/3 triggers); Atlassian's official remote MCP server went GA Feb 2026 covering Jira/Confluence/Bitbucket via OAuth2.1 or API tokens.

name: Asana
one_liner: Work management platform for tracking tasks, projects, and team goals.
self_serve_notes: Personal access tokens are free and instant via a free Developer Sandbox; OAuth also available for multi-user apps.

api_surface.notes: Broad REST API spanning tasks, projects, portfolios, goals, custom fields, and webhooks.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists an Asana toolkit (153 tools/6 triggers); Asana's own developer docs describe an official MCP Server and compatible clients.

name: Monday.com
one_liner: Work operating system for building custom project and workflow apps.
self_serve_notes: Personal API v2 tokens are available even on the free 2-user plan; full API access is not gated behind a paid tier.

api_surface.notes: GraphQL API covering boards, items, columns, groups, automations, and users.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Monday.com toolkit (121 tools) with OAuth2; monday.com also promotes its own MCP/agent offering.

name: ClickUp
one_liner: All-in-one productivity platform for tasks, docs, goals, and time tracking.
self_serve_notes: Personal API tokens (pk_ prefixed, non-expiring) are free and instant to generate; MCP server available on all plans including Free Forever.

api_surface.notes: Broad REST API for tasks, lists, folders, spaces, docs, and time tracking.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a ClickUp toolkit (162 tools) with OAuth2/API Key; ClickUp also runs its own official MCP server (mcp.clickup.com) in public beta.

name: Coda
one_liner: Doc-based platform blending documents, spreadsheets, and apps (now under Superhuman).
self_serve_notes: API is bearer-token authenticated and free to all users on free and paid workspaces; brand recently folded into 'Superhuman Docs' but API/docs still live.

api_surface.notes: RESTful API for docs, tables, rows, formulas, and automations, now documented at docs.superhuman.com.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Coda toolkit (109 tools/4 triggers); Superhuman Docs' own site references a Superhuman Docs MCP server.

name: Smartsheet
one_liner: Enterprise work management platform combining spreadsheets with automation.
self_serve_notes: API access tokens cannot be generated on the free trial or Free plan; it requires a Business, Enterprise, or Advanced Work Management plan.

api_surface.notes: Broad REST API for sheets, rows, columns, attachments, reports, and workspaces, gated behind paid tiers.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: No Composio Smartsheet toolkit found (404 on toolkit page); no official MCP server confirmed.

main_blocker: API access requires paid Business/Enterprise plan

name: Harvest
one_liner: Time tracking and invoicing software for teams and freelancers.
self_serve_notes: Personal access tokens are free/instant to generate, and a no-credit-card 30-day free trial (or the permanent Free plan for 1 seat) allows full API access.

api_surface.notes: REST v2 API focused on time entries, projects, clients, invoices, and expenses.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Harvest toolkit (57 tools) using OAuth2; no official Harvest MCP server found.
